title: breynia pierrei
intro: Breynia pierrei, also known as the Dottie Plant or Clerodendron, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae, native to New Caledonia. The plant's leaves and roots are used in traditional medicine, exhibiting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Its health benefits include the potential treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antiviral agent. Breynia pierrei can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional remedies and folk medicine.
